Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface Games.LichessBuilder

All Superinterfaces:
Games.CommonLichessOpeningExplorer<Games.LichessBuilder>, Games.CommonOpeningExplorer<Games.LichessBuilder>
Enclosing interface:
Games
public static interface Games.LichessBuilder extends Games.CommonOpeningExplorer<Games.LichessBuilder>, Games.CommonLichessOpeningExplorer<Games.LichessBuilder>

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static enum 
    Games.LichessBuilder.RatingGroup
    Specifies a rating group, which includes ratings up to next rating group.
    _1600 indicates ratings between 1600-1800 and _2500 indicates ratings from 2500 and up.

    One or more rating groups, ranging from their value to the next higher group
    Games.LichessBuilder
    topGames(int games)
    Number of top games to display <= 8
    Default 4
